_publications._publicationTitle: Immortalized Human Schwann Cell Lines Derived From Tumors of Schwannomatosis Patients.

_contextSnippet: At passage 6 we performed a growth curve for Hp-SWN-14F schwannomatosis cell and non-immortalized human Schwann cells in culture. Population doubling time was similar in all cells
details: Population doubling time was similar between immortalized schwannomatosis cells and non-immortalized human Schwann cells at passage 6
